note: What Claude Code assembles into a /v1/messages request and what streams back. Source lines valid at the pinned revision in docs/methodology.md.

request.label: System prompt — stable sections
request.note: Identity, tool guidelines, skills, hooks info. Built from cached sections, computed once and held until /clear or /compact. The prefix can use a global cache scope shared across orgs.

request.label: __SYSTEM_PROMPT_DYNAMIC_BOUNDARY__
request.note: Sentinel splitting the cacheable static prefix from per-user volatile content. Everything above is cacheable; everything below is not.

request.label: System prompt — dynamic
request.note: Per-user / volatile sections that sit after the boundary.

request.label: Tool JSON schemas
request.note: Tool schemas are stable across a session — a prime cache target. The LAST tool block carries one of the two cache breakpoints.

request.label: CLAUDE.md (nested_memory)
request.note: Hierarchical memory files (managed → user → project → local), @include expanded, injected as nested_memory attachments and cached to avoid re-injection.

request.label: Conversation history
request.note: Prior turns and their tool_result blocks.

request.label: Last user message
request.note: Carries the second cache breakpoint — caching the long stable prefix up to here without exceeding Anthropic's breakpoint budget.

response.label: assistant text
response.note: Tokens stream back as they're generated.

response.label: tool_use block
response.note: id + name + input. Detected by watching the stream for tool_use blocks — stop_reason='tool_use' is treated as unreliable.

response.label: tool_result → next request
response.note: After the tool runs, a tool_result keyed by tool_use_id is appended and the next request goes out — re-hitting the cached prefix.

caching.ttl: 5 minutes default; 1 hour for eligible users (GrowthBook-gated, querySource allowlist, resolved once per session)
caching.breakpoints: at most one each on the last tool-schema block and the last user-message block
caching.references: microcompaction reuses cached tool inputs by tool_use_id via cache_references
